data.content: Shipment complete. Merged feature branch work/foolery-c355-impl-20260321 (fcba1f7d) to main via merge commit a57ac980. Pushed to origin/main. Lint and typecheck clean (work/ worktree errors are pre-existing, not in src/). Changes: font sizes bumped +1px across conversation log components, text colors shifted lighter for better contrast on dark backgrounds, background opacities increased, icon sizes bumped in agent-history-view.tsx and interaction-picker.tsx.
